positive: A stylized, minimalist composition featuring a single, majestic mountain range silhouette at sunset. The mountains should have sharp, geometric peaks and dramatic, sweeping lines. In the foreground, incorporate abstract elements like flowing, stylized rivers or constellations connecting the peaks. The overall color palette must be highly contrasting, utilizing deep indigo blues, vibrant saffron yellows, and burnt oranges for a modern, vaporwave-inspired aesthetic. Use negative space effectively, ensuring the main subject remains clean and isolated for printing. Perfect for apparel art, high contrast, digital illustration, vectors, flat design, cinematic lighting, rule of thirds, central composition.
negative: text, watermark, signature, logo, blurry, noise, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, grayscale, cartoon, photographic, messy, cluttered, gradient fade
